title: Power One Files for Drilling Permit to Deep Test Pecors Magnetic Anomaly
description: VANCOUVER, British Columbia, July 08, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Power One Resources Corp. (TSX:V - PWRO) (“Power One” or the “Company”) is pleased to announce it has filled for an updated drill permit to return to the Pecors Project with plans to deep-test the Pecors magnetic anomaly. The Permit application is currently under review by the Ontario Ministry of Mines. The Pecors Project located within the Elliot L

title: Statkraft to invest in 280 MW wind project in Brazil
description:
(Florianópolis, Brazil/Oslo, Norway 8 July 2026) – Statkraft has decided to invest in Gran Sul, a 280 MW onshore wind project in the state of Rio Grande do Sul, Brazil. The investment strengthens Statkraft’s renewable energy portfolio in one of the company’s key international growth markets.

The Gran Sul project is located in Santa Vitória do Palmar, an area with strong wind resources in southern Brazil. The project will add new renewable power generation to the Brazil

title: Statkraft investerer i 280 MW vindkraftprosjekt i Brasil
description: (Florianópolis, Brasil/Oslo, Norge 8. juli 2026) – Statkraft har besluttet å investere i Gran Sul, et landbasert vindkraftprosjekt på 280 megawatt i delstaten Rio Grande do Sul i Brasil. Investeringen styrker Statkrafts fornybarportefølje i et av selskapets viktigste internasjonale vekstmarkeder.

title: Ignitis secures additional long-term capacity at the Klaipėda LNG terminal
description: AB “Ignitis grupė” (hereinafter – the Group) announces that, following the long-term capacity allocation procedure conducted by Klaipėda LNG terminal operator AB “KN Energies” (hereinafter – KN Energies), its subsidiary UAB “Ignitis”, in accordance with the Regulations for Use of the Liquefied Natural Gas Terminal, has additionally secured 2 TWh of annual regasification capacity on the secondary market for the period of 2033–2044.

title: Ignitis secures additional long-term capacity at the Klaipėda LNG terminal
description: AB “Ignitis grupė” (hereinafter – the Group) announces that, following the long-term capacity allocation procedure conducted by Klaipėda LNG terminal operator AB “KN Energies” (hereinafter – KN Energies), its subsidiary UAB “Ignitis”, in accordance with the Regulations for Use of the Liquefied Natural Gas Terminal, has additionally secured 2 TWh of annual regasification capacity on the secondary market for the period of 2033–2044.

title: „Ignitis“ papildomai rezervavo ilgalaikių Klaipėdos SGD terminalo pajėgumų
description: AB „Ignitis grupė“ (toliau – Grupė) informuoja, kad po  Klaipėdos SGD operatorės AB „KN Energies“ (toliau – „KN Energies“) ilgalaikių pajėgumų skirstymo procedūros, jos dukterinė įmonė UAB „Ignitis“ pagal „KN Energies“ naudojimosi SGD terminalu taisykles antrinėje rinkoje papildomai rezervavo 2 TWh metinių išdujinimo pajėgumų 2033–2044 metų laikotarpiui.

title: Novian group significantly improved profitability in 2025 and increased export revenue by 52%
description: In 2025, the Novian IT solutions and services group-maintained revenue of more than EUR 40 million, significantly improved its profitability indicators and increased exports. The group’s consolidated revenue amounted to EUR 40.25 million, gross profit grew to EUR 9.21 million, and adjusted EBITDA increased by 25.9% to EUR 3.53 million.

title: „Novian“ grupė 2025 m. reikšmingai gerino pelningumą, eksportą augino 52 proc.
description: IT sprendimų ir paslaugų grupė „Novian“ 2025 m. išlaikė daugiau nei 40 mln. eurų pajamų lygį, reikšmingai pagerino pelningumo rodiklius ir augino eksportą. Konsoliduotos grupės pajamos siekė 40,25 mln. eurų, bendrasis pelnas augo iki 9,21 mln. eurų, o koreguota EBITDA didėjo 25,9 proc. – iki 3,53 mln. eurų.
